inputs.label: Rales Coverage (% of lung fields)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of lung fields with crackles/rales on auscultation.

inputs.label: S3 Gallop Present
inputs.businessContext: Presence of an S3 gallop (0 = No, 1 = Yes).

inputs.label: Signs of Hypoperfusion
inputs.businessContext: Clinical signs of peripheral hypoperfusion (0 = No, 1 = Yes).

formulas.description: ((hypoperfusion === 1 && systolic_bp < 90) ? 'Killip Class IV - Mortality Risk: 81%' : (rales_extent > 50 ? 'Killip Class III - Mortality Risk: 38%' : ((rales_extent > 0 || s3_gallop === 1) ? 'Killip Class II - Mortality Risk: 17%' : 'Killip Class I - Mortality Risk: 6%')))
